user.description: Create, update and manage the subscription status of your users

event.description: Track events based on actions your customers take in real time

addTags.description: Adds a tag to a users profile

create.description: Create or update a user profile

removeTags.description: Removes a tag from a users profile

track.description: Track an event for a specific customer

id.description: The unique identifier of the customer

email.description: The table to create the row in

dataAttributesUi.description: Key value pairs that represent any properties you want to track with this event

key.description: Name of the property to set

value.description: Value of the property to set

value.description: Value of the property to set

dataAttributesJson.description: Key value pairs that represent the custom user properties you want to update

newId.description: The new unique identifier of the user

eventName.description: The name of the event tracked

extraAttributesUi.description: Key value pairs that represent reserved, Vero-specific operators. Refer to the note on “deduplication” below.

value.description: Value of the property to set
